documents.title: Latest Session Note
documents.description: Rolling session note — most recent session summary, what changed, what's live, what's pending. Updated after each autonomous or manual session.

documents.title: QI Brain Architecture
documents.file: TBD — to be confirmed from C:\UNIVERSAL\qi_brain\
documents.description: QI Brain is QI Hive's nervous system on port 9010. Full architecture documented in the Brain project.

documents.title: Session Summaries
documents.description: Per-session summaries saved to the shared QI documentation folder. Prefix: QIH_. All QI projects write here.

documents.title: Project Memory Index
documents.description: Master index of memory files for the QI Hive / Claude Manager project.

documents.title: QI Hive Folder Strategy
documents.description: C:\QIP for projects, C:\QIB for business. Migrate one at a time.

documents.title: QI Project Standard
documents.description: 7-folder layout applied to every QI project: engine/config/data/logs/tests/docs/tools.

documents.title: Per-project nssm.exe policy
documents.description: Each QI project ships its own engine/bin/nssm.exe — never centralise.

documents.title: Dashboard Server
documents.description: FastAPI v3.0.0 on port 8600. AdminLTE v4 + Bootstrap 5 + SortableJS. 12 nav pages. Reads status.json + tasks.json. Queries QI Brain client. Usage stats from usage_stats.py.

documents.title: QI Brain Client
documents.description: HTTP client to QI Brain API (port 9010). Functions: brain_online(), get_agents(), get_ecosystem_snapshot(), get_recent_sessions(), get_agent_profile(), get_brain_status(). Used by Hive and dashboard pages.

documents.title: Health Check
documents.description: run_health_check() — checks all 11 registered projects: NSSM service status, port open, git branch + uncommitted changes, docs currency, session summary presence. sync_tasks() helper.

documents.title: Project Status
documents.description: Project status rendering helpers for the dashboard.

documents.title: Usage Stats
documents.description: Parses ~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl for Claude Code token and cost tracking. No API calls — pure local file parsing. Functions: today(), daily(n), by_project(n), by_model(n), totals(n), sessions_log(days, limit). 30-second in-memory cache. Pricing: Opus $15/75 · Sonnet $3/15 · Haiku $0.80/4 per 1M tokens. Cache token multipliers applied.

documents.title: Service Control (qi_service.py)
documents.description: restart(service_name) / start() / stop() — routes through elevation broker. Returns True/False. Any Claude session can import this to autonomously restart QI services without UAC. from engine.common.qi_service import restart, start, stop.

documents.title: Elevation Client
documents.description: Drops JSON command files into C:\QIH\commands\pending\. Elevation broker picks them up and executes as LocalSystem. Regex whitelist enforced — only pre-approved commands accepted.

documents.title: Elevation Broker (qi_elevate.py)
documents.description: NSSM service QI_Elevate. Watches C:\QIH\commands\pending\. Runs whitelisted commands as LocalSystem. NSSM AppExit=Restart (3s delay). Stale-queue purge on startup (>5 min old). Single-instance PID lock at C:\QIH\logs\elevation\broker.lock.

documents.title: QI Logger
documents.description: Shared logger for all QI Hive components. get_logger(service_name), set_level(), list_services(). Used by dashboard and all engine modules.

documents.title: Hive Report
documents.description: Report generation helpers for the Hive page.

documents.title: Status JSON
documents.description: Project registry for the dashboard. Projects dict with name, status, current_task, notes. Session log array. Read by render_dashboard() and render_board(). Manual or script-updated.

documents.title: Tasks JSON
documents.description: Kanban board task store. tasks array: {id, title, description, column, project, agent, priority}. CRUD via /api/tasks endpoints. columns: backlog | in_progress | review | done.
